chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 262 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Kaleemullah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with ASI Abdul Ghafoor Leghari, P.S. Sakrand. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
